title: daphne bholua var. glacialis
intro: Daphne bholua var. glacialis, also known as Himalayan wintergreen or White Daphne, is a variety of flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and easing respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Daphne bholua var. glacialis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to use caution when handling the plant due to its potential toxicity.
